## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for any program behavior change
- [ ] `anchor test` passes locally (or CI is green)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes (rustfmt clean)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or CLI changed
- [ ] Conventional commit prefix (`feat:`/`fix:`/`test:`/`docs:`/`ci:`/`chore:`)
